steps: File formal tax reclaim with Citigroup Australia for AUD 138,750 citing AU-NO treaty Article 10 reducing withholding from 30% to 15%
Submit Norwegian tax residency certificate and beneficial ownership declaration to support the 15% treaty rate claim
Reference BHP dividend payment date and provide calculation showing correct net should be AUD 1,179,375 vs received AUD 1,040,625
Request Citigroup process reclaim within 90 days or escalate through their institutional client services for expedited recovery

references.title: ATO – Withholding from Dividends Paid to Foreign Residents
AU Treasury – Income Tax Treaties Table
